'''Kogan 6''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kogan system/Legends|Kogan system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Dr. [[Bromial]] led an [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology|Obroan Institute]] [[Archaeology/Legends|archeological]] expedition onboard the ''[[Penga Rift]]'' to Kogan 6 after the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>.
